baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Double-hit on 1–3 in negative GMI years. The Quant's inversion mechanic is eligible on this asset in any negative GMI year. This asset qualifies for the Quant's Pact Dividend roll each year it's held.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: The Quant's inversion mechanic is eligible on this asset in any negative GMI year. Non-Quant: +1 loan cap if GMI this year is negative (defensive spread positioning). This asset qualifies for the Quant's Pact Dividend roll each year it's held.

flavourText: The spread is the product. Everything else is theatre.
